title: Supplementary Material 1 for article " Ex-situ growth protocol for the invasive macrophyte Pontederia crassipes"
author: da Silva Brito, Letícia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains information about biomass, the relative growth rate of plants and the salinity of Pontederia crassipes. It also contains information about water parameters and nutrient uptake based on a mesocosm experiment.
steps_raw: This dataset contains information about biomass, the relative growth rate of plants and the salinity of Pontederia crassipes. It also contains information about water parameters and nutrient uptake based on a mesocosm experiment.
